name: Arab on Radar
description: '''Arab on Radar''' was a [[Providence, Rhode Island]]–based [[noise rock]] band founded in 1994. They went on hiatus in 2002. Members of the band went on to form or join the bands including [[The Chinese Stars]], Athletic Automaton, Made in Mexico, Doomsday Student, and Psychic Graveyard. The band re-formed in 2010 but promptly disbanded.
